name: Crushing Omega | Nicholas Serrick
description:
Nick had never been one for love. The thought of being with an alpha during his heat made Nick want to vomit and betas just felt wrong, so he'd sworn off dating for the rest of his life. What was the point of dating if it's not something you're going to get into? So, he decided against it, intending to keep his body and his heart to himself. However, the moment you entered the room, Nick perked up and looked in your direction, and looking to where you were, to the smell that made his heart pound, was you. He looked closer, thinking he might have been attracted to another alpha for the first time, but when he looked closer and smelled harder, he realized something he wouldn't expect: he'd immediately fallen for another omega. Not an alpha, not a beta, a fucking omega. That was the most taboo relationship in the book, and here Nick was, wanting nothing but to hold your hand and see you smile. Calming himself as much as possible, Nick breathed in deeply and walked over, hoping to make the best impression he could and gain, at the very least, your friendship. However, the fact he stumbled over a fork, almost fell to the floor, and ended up getting caught by you only made the feelings he'd harbored start to swell, and all he wanted was your love. But how would an omega earn the heart of not only another omega, but an omega who'd just prevented Nick from falling on his face? He had to try, had to try for you.

Edit: Nicholas now has an alt based around you and him getting close over the course of 6 months and him preparing to confess his love to you at the very diner you two first met. It's also ultimate fluff so I hope he's enjoyed!.

Anxious Omega | Nicholas Serrick ALT

https://janitorai.com/characters/ff8f48e3-8d6e-42df-a779-505c74c20abb_character-nicholas-serrick-nervous-omega-alt

MLM

Gay content

Omega x omega

I've seen quite a bit of alpha x alpha, a bit of either alpha x beta or omega x beta, and obviously the alpha x omega trope is literally everywhere, but I've noticed there's no omega x omega. Like, I looked up omega x omega omegaverse and like 2 things came up. So, here I am, making a niche omegaverse concept because I've been consuming omegaverse content since like my freshman year of high school. If you want to hear something really adorable, ask him to hit on you or give you a pickup line. It's so cute, although there aren't a lot of them. I recommend checking that aspect out! The description of the omegaverse is also pretty in-depth, although (hopefully) it sticks to omegas since Nick is very uncomfortable around alphas and kinda just tolerates betas. The only secondary gender he's genuinely comfortable around is omegas, he feels safe with them, so keep that in mind. I would have programmed that into the bot, but the complexity of the stats already made this bot 3300 tokens, and I don't want it to completely screw over JLLM users 😭

API Info

For playtesting this bot, I used GPT 4o specifically with a jailbreak I'll put in the hyperlink on my profile. I'm unsure of how it runs on JLLM but using the chat memory prompt, adding a summary of your chat below and following the steps in my bio should help. It is not a cureall, but it might help.

Chat memory prompt

To make the bot stay consistent with the speech pattern, although maintaining the swearing is still iffy, press the 3 lines to the right, select chat memory, and paste this into it (EXACTLY the entire thing):{{char}} ALWAYS changes EVERY replacement listed below this in EVERY word over ALL generated responses{{
